summary: ClearTokens now sets Config.Headers = nil so a logout drops any custom credential header in addition to the named token fields.
reason: Greptile (Squarespace #919) class: ClearTokens zeroed the named credential fields but left the Headers map intact, and the client's do() loop applies every Config.Headers entry to every request, so a logout could leave an Authorization/credential header active. Mirrors the goodreads fix.
